## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Requirement Traceability

- Requirement IDs: `REQ-...` (required when scope/behavior changed)
- Requirement source: `memory/warm/requirements.md`

## Change Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant checks/tests were run
- [ ] `scripts/governance-check.sh` was run if policy/rules changed
- Evidence:

## Memory Protocol

- [ ] Updated `memory/warm/change-log.md`
- [ ] Updated `memory/warm/requirements.md` if requirements changed
- [ ] Appended factual entry in active `memory/cold/YYYY-MM.md`
- [ ] Updated `memory/hot.md` if active state changed

## Risk Review

- Risk level (L0-L4):
- Notable risks and mitigations:
